reviews.review_title: Can no longer access, to allow a friend
reviews.review_description: I thought this was a great app, and when friends come over and they want to use the Oculus, or I want to let them experience it, this is always my first stop. But it has disappeared from my Oculus, and although I can search for it in the store, the get button is grayed out. When I search for it in my app library. Even ensuring that I am searching all apps and not just installed or tutorial or some other sub folder, it does not show up. AI instructed me to try and push it from this meta horizon app, but that didn't work either. Download button is grayed out and there is no option to install. So very disappointed that I have a friend that will be using this tomorrow and there will be no way to show her how to get accustomed to the interface

The first time I was on the edge, I had to walk back. It took me some courage, but then it was great. Few options from glas planks that break, disco in the elevature, and a surprise button. It isn't a game you can spend hours, but it is fun to let others try and see their reaction 😄

reviews.review_title: Should be a mandatory experience for all
reviews.review_description: My first VR experience, and I feel should be mandatory for everyone! It's just a wonderful way to be introduced to VR. You could, honestly, sit there and play around with the three environments they provide for hours. A lot more fun than it has a right to be!
This game was really fun that it kept me on there till 4 am
This is a pretty good tutorial for vr, helping people getting used to it and making them learn the basics, if you a quest, try it, trust me
This game should be EVERYONE's first experience with VR. Briliant!
It was an amazing experience for me because I am new and this just made it everything better

This is a really fun game for all users new or experienced I playlist pretty much every time I go on my VR and whenever other people that have never been on the VR use my VR I show them this game and they always love it
I am using Meta Quest 3 and i love to play with the headset. If i want to trow something, i am using cubes, rockets, etc.
Space consuming and useless because every game gives you a tutorial
It was awesome but now doesn't allow me in. Hoping this doesn't happen with others

As a full-time wheelchair user, I bought the quest for therapeutic value. The ability to go places I can only dream of. However, this app starts upon first use of the headset, I set up a static Guardian and then found I was stuck after making a fist and pointing a finger, there is no button! I couldn't find a way out and had to press buttons madly ending up in the menu, only to discover that this app is useless for sitters to get the basics of VR. Please change this! I can't be the only one.
So I ruined it.

reviews.review_title: Had fun till my quest crashed
reviews.review_description: When I put a cartridge in my quest froze so I went on Google and held down my power button and the volume buttons a it sent me to I bois menu click launch device and it was all back to normal never launching that app again
Ever since I played there had been a red dot in my vision all the time, how can I fix this?

reviews.review_title: Great to get to know the controls
reviews.review_description:
First steps is great for beginners. When I first started this game really helped me . A lot of people think first steps is amazing but there is hundreds other games in the oculus store.

There is one thing they need to improve on like there isn’t much thing to play with on the table .

Hope you like playing the Virtual Reality head set.

Can you help me out, every time I try first steps I’m like in the ground, it doesn’t see me standing. Nothing is near me and I can’t do anything because it thinks Im on a floor and i can’t even have fun that way.
I can't even get to the game so how am I supposed to have FUN!!!!!!!¹

It's mostly a good tutorial. I use it, but only because there's not another tutorial. There are a lot of positive reviews and I think they hit the main points so I'll focus on the negatives. 

-The touch demo is integrated into the app, so you can't teach the controls separately. 
-You have to interact with every kind of object in order to advance. If someone is struggling to work the controls there's no way to push through the tutorial to the next step. 
-The 2 demos (shooting and dancing) can only be accessed by completing the tutorial. You can't just show someone those without completing the rest of the tutorial. 
-The dancing is too long. It's fun and there's novelty to it, but everyone I've shown has shown signs of disinterest by the end. I've had dozens of people at different ages try this.

reviews.review_title: Great start for new VR users
reviews.review_description: A great way to start in VR. Nice graphics, you can grab a lot of things, learn the basics, you can feel the sensation to be in a new world. Special mention to the dancing robot, you feel he is your new friend on VR : )

People will think because this is just an instructional app for free it won’t be as good but it’s a blast that I always come back to.  It amazes me how many of the best apps are either free or less expensive.  But this let’s you feel VR more than others.
My height is completely messed up
Don't know why this says you don't need an internet connection. Tried showing the app off to colleagues at work who've never tried VR and they couldn't try it out. Fun when it works.
I was loving this experience until I got to the point when my virtual hands were supposed to appear - but they were invisible! They worked but I couldn't see them. Please fix this bug!!!!

developer_response.body:
Hi Tinfoil_Unicorn! 
Thanks for the feedback, does this happen each time you play First Steps? And do you know if you were playing in a "roomscale" or "stationary" play space when this occurred? 
Thanks!

reviews.review_description: Good to show off with.
Very fun. Great tutorial. Felt incredibly personal first time dancing with the robot.

reviews.review_title: “I can see why you like this so much”
reviews.review_description: My parents got me the Quest for Christmas, and since my dad is already a gamer he wanted to try it out. Had him load this up, and he was blown away. He was absolutely immersed and had a lot of fun with the blimp! The title of this review was what he told me while playing it. Definitely let this be the first experience a new user tries, it’s perfect!

SO immerse, and impressive off the bat. The mini games are a lot of fun, and I could just hang out at the main table figuring out how to hit a ping pong ball and throw paper airplanes. The dancing robot was surprisingly entertaining even though I heard about it beforehand. The lazer gun too! Definitely a good start to show off what vr can do.
Best game
Great first game to show new people to VR. SO loved dancing with the robot :)

This is my first VR headset and this 'game' (along with First Contact) are great for beginners of any age. 

I play it often because it's so cute and I also let others play it who are using VR for the first time and they always have a such a great time.

Even if you already know the controls, this is such a cute way to relax and have some fun with no 'end goal' like other games.
The perfect little Vr experience that show off what VR is..I really enjoyed it alot when I first fired up my Oculas Quest..I wish it  wouldn't end so quickly.

Update: Figured it out – it was over my head, in sitting position could not be seen.lol  — FYI for all in same situation. If possible, Stand up and you’ll see it.  5 stars!

Please help – don’t see a button to push in the initial set up of virtual hands; pointing with index finger. There’s no button seen to push. Using stationary position. Thank you!
Yep
Great great great Great great great Great great great Great great great Great great great Great great great Great great great Great great great

This was one of the coolest experiences I think I have ever had involving technology. Was so amazed by everything around me during the playtime. Also this was the first VR headset I have ever used. If someone is planning on trying out my Quest I’m showing them this app. 5 stars.
Cool to see all the features
Fun way to get you used to the mo emebt and boundries.

reviews.review_title: I love the robot it so cute
reviews.review_description: The title is my review

Got myself an Oculus Quest today and it's the first thing I've done on it. Really shows off the 'wow factor' of VR. This is the first thing I'll be putting on for friends and family when they come round. Nothing too complicated or intense. Overall, a great little piece of VR fun 👍
